fairness_definition: Tune (K_R,K_w) on nominal 30° case to equalize RMS SO(3) attitude error angle e_ang between Euler and Quaternion propagation.
euler_convention: ZYX: R = Rz(psi) Ry(theta) Rx(phi) (Euler only for propagation)
quaternion_convention: q=[qw,qx,qy,qz], normalized each step (Quaternion only for propagation)
controller: tau = -K_R e_R - K_w e_w + omega x (I omega), e_R=0.5 vee(R_d^T R - R^T R_d), omega_d=0
